creator: meka@tilda.center
text:
Created attachment 245427
ormar.patch

I ran tests few times on amd64 machine and they are not failing, even if I have py39-ormar installed (version 0.12.2, not the previous one). When there is no py39-ormar installed, tests break with circular dependency. I will take this upstream and try to fix it, but in the mean time I think we can merge this.
